scripts.check: npm run preflight:native-deps && biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && node scripts/check-file-length.mjs && tsgo --noEmit && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.skills:verify-sync:all: npm run skills:verify-sync && npm run skills:addy:verify-sync
scripts.skills:sync:all: npm run skills:sync && npm run skills:addy:sync
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
